caption: Jatayu battles Ravana to save Sita
scene: Ravana in his flying chariot carrying off Sita, while the noble vulture-king Jatayu attacks him in the sky with outstretched wings and talons, trying to rescue mother Sita. Sita reaches out in distress. Dramatic, heroic sacrifice.
